---
title: "My Morning R Markdown Report"
author: "Your name"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
    code_folding: show
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  message = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  fig.width = 7,
  fig.height = 4
)

dat <- read.csv("data/workshop_biomarkers.csv")
n_records <- nrow(dat)
median_pfoa <- median(dat$pfoa_serum)
```

# Purpose

This is my editable R Markdown report. The workshop lesson pages are read-only.

# Data preview

```{r data-preview, echo=TRUE}
head(dat)
```

# Dynamic summary

The synthetic teaching dataset contains `r n_records` records. The median simulated serum PFOA concentration is `r round(median_pfoa, 2)`.

# Notes

- Add one learning goal here.
- Add another learning goal here.
